passes_defended_per_game_z.what: Passes defended per game — breakups and deflections
passes_defended_per_game_z.limits: Doesn't capture plays where the QB avoided throwing at this CB entirely.

interceptions_per_game_z.limits: Low frequency. Some INTs are scheme/luck, not coverage skill.

solo_tackle_rate_z.what: Solo tackles as % of total tackles
solo_tackle_rate_z.limits: High solo rate could mean the CB is making plays in space, or that help is slow arriving.

tackles_per_snap_z.limits: High tackle rates for a CB can mean receivers are catching the ball (bad) and the CB is cleaning up (mixed signal).

tfl_per_game_z.limits: Rare for CBs. Usually means blitzing or run support.

forced_fumbles_per_game_z.limits: Very rare. One play dominates career rates.

man_coverage_epa_z.what: THEORETICAL: Average EPA allowed on pass plays when this CB is on the field in man coverage
man_coverage_epa_z.how: Sum of EPA on man coverage pass plays where this CB was listed as an on-field defender, divided by number of such plays. Inverted so positive z = fewer points allowed. Requires 30+ man coverage pass snaps.
man_coverage_epa_z.limits: ⚠️ TIER 4 — THEORETICAL. We know the team was in man, and we know this CB was on the field, but we do NOT know which receiver this CB was covering. The EPA reflects the entire play, not just this CB's assignment. Only available for 2023-2024 seasons (participation data). Treat as directional signal, not ground truth.

man_coverage_comp_pct_z.what: THEORETICAL: Completion % on pass plays when this CB is on the field in man coverage
man_coverage_comp_pct_z.how: Completions / pass attempts on man coverage plays where this CB was on the field. Inverted so positive z = fewer completions allowed. Requires 30+ man coverage pass snaps.
man_coverage_comp_pct_z.limits: ⚠️ TIER 4 — THEORETICAL. Same caveats as man coverage EPA. We don't know which receiver was this CB's assignment. A completion to the other side of the field still counts against every CB on the field. Only 2023-2024 data.
